First specimen pure core (offline): crates/nq-monitor/src/lease_presence_probe.rs — nq.probe.lease_presence.v1, clock-injected, compares a pfSense DHCP lease report against presence observations (ARP residue / NQ probe from a named vantage). Non-lift ladder: corroborated / uncorroborated / cannot_testify_no_presence_basis / lease_expired_or_absent. Refusals are the product (lease != presence; uncorroborated != host-down). Receipt-only, no coercion. 11 offline fixtures.
Operator decisions captured: read path = SSH + pfctl (key-only, LAN/VPN-only, read-only); first check = lease-vs-presence as a cheap non-lift. SNMP queued as a later RuntimeReport channel.

GATED next slice (NOT started): live SSH read — needs operator to enable read-only SSH on the pfSense LAN gateway + a named vantage. ISC-vs-Kea lease detection; arp -an; optional ICMP/TCP presence probe from the vantage.
